thesis_summary: High-purity indium (InP substrates) bottleneck for CPO/laser diodes; China export controls; KOL喊+散户冷=最佳窗口; Layer 3 score 7.0/10
layer_attribution: Layer 2 (supply chain bottleneck) validated but Layer 1 (macro) overwhelmed — broad Nasdaq selloff (-3.04%) crushed high-beta names; AXTI dropped -11.85% on day, closing $91.56 well below entry zone. Stop $80 remains intact.
notes: Entry was unlucky on timing as broad risk-off (VIX +22%, Nasdaq -3%) hit high-beta semis hard. Thesis intact — pure macro miss. $AXTI 5-day trend -16.42% from $110.85 peak. No China export ban catalyst yet.

thesis_summary: CPO bottleneck; Nvidia optics endorsement; 800G/1.6T optical module ramp; Layer 1 catalyst (Nvidia optics) + Layer 2 CPO supply chain bottleneck
layer_attribution: Layer 1 (strong earnings + Nvidia optics tailwind) and Layer 2 (CPO bottleneck) continue driving; stock hit $1049.53 intraday peak during the week (near $1050 target), then pulled back -7.31% on market-wide selloff today. Midpoint entry $775 to close $873.55 = +12.72% still green through macro storm.
notes: Strongest performer of the three. Briefly touched $1050 target zone before Nasdaq carnage. LITE's $650M private share exchange announced Jun 4 adds equity overhang risk but optics thesis remains intact. Entry zone well below current price.

thesis_summary: Data center power/cooling bottleneck; grid transformation; AI datacenter electrification capex cycle; Layer 1 (grid bottleneck) + Layer 2 (data center power)
layer_attribution: Layer 1 (AI data center power demand) and Layer 2 (grid bottleneck) both intact. VRT highlighted by IBD as 'testing key level after rocketing 90% this year'. Midpoint entry $285 to close $301.65 = +5.88% despite -5.95% day wipeout. Target $350 remains achievable.
notes: Fell -5.95% today on Nasdaq rout but still positive from entry zone. Data center power thesis backed by multiple analyst reports. Year-to-date +88% makes it extended but thesis unchanged. Stop $250 ~17% below entry — well protected.

thesis_summary: 高纯铟/InP衬底瓶颈，AI光通信CPO需求爆棚，AXTI扩产+垂直整合护城河，Serenity核心持仓
layer_attribution: Layer 3 scorecard 7.8 / Layer 2 supply chain bottleneck / Layer 5 sell put on high IV
notes: 价格从6/5收盘103.97跌至89.04(-14.4%)，已进入并跌破入场区间。但止损80未触发。下跌主因非基本面恶化——AXTI 6/3发布翻倍扩产计划(2026年底InP产能×2，2027再×2)，基本面逻辑强化。暴跌由宏观驱动：5月就业数据推30年国债收益率突破5%，重挫所有长周期资本开支敏感型股票(AXTI日内低点87.27)。属于利率冲击下的错杀，非瓶颈论点证伪。Serenity逻辑(高纯铟/InP供应瓶颈+CPO需求)完好。若宏观企稳，此处是加仓机会而非止损点。

thesis_summary: Hyperscaler资本开支驱动数据中心电力瓶颈，VRT电源/冷却设备订单积压创纪录
layer_attribution: Layer 1 hyperscaler capex catalyst / Layer 2 power bottleneck / Layer 3 scorecard 7.5
notes: 价格从6/5收盘318.95跌至300.51(-5.78%)，精准触及入场区间上沿300。止损293未触发。下跌原因明确：30年国债收益率>5%显著提升数据中心/电网基础设施融资成本，WSJ专门报道数据中心股票被"clobbered"。需求端(Hyperscaler capex)仍然创纪录，但融资成本上升可能导致部分项目排期拉长。VRT是这次宏观冲击中跌幅较小的电力股(相对ATKR -3.8%和KE -5.1%)，说明市场仍认可其护城河。Rate shock vs. secular demand的经典博弈，论点暂时被宏观压制而非证伪。

thesis_summary: NFP恐慌后买入关键金属瓶颈股，AXTI为7N高纯铟/镓/锗龙头，中国管制反弹受益。Sell Put strike $75收割高IV。
notes: 中止损未触发(30日低$65.02>止$65)。股价从$80中轨涨至$89.04(+11.3%)，但今日NFP引发-14.36%暴跌至$89(盘中低$87.27)。此前曾冲高至$143(+78%)完成止盈，现大幅回撤。Sell Put strike $75安全距离约16%。需观察NFP恐慌是否持续发酵，若连续跌破$80则瓶颈叙事面临考验。

thesis_summary: AI基建持续投入+CPO光模块瓶颈受益。Nvidia CEO公开强调Lumentum解决AI数据中心互连瓶颈，+$650M债转股去杠杆+新美国光工厂。
notes: 中止损未触发(30日低$780.48>止$780.00，精确到小数点)。从$830中轨涨至$863.66(+4.05%)，但今日NFP引发-6.31%回调。6/5曾因Nvidia背书+债转股消息涨~10%。此前冲高至$1085(+31%)触近止盈区，现回落至$864。NFP宏观冲击整体科技股，但AI光学叙事仍完整。债转股减少稀释风险，美国工厂扩产为中长期催化剂。

thesis_summary: AXTI rides China critical mineral (Ga/Ge/In) supply bottleneck + hyperscaler AI buildout demand for InP substrates — reverse-engineered supply chain bottleneck play.
layer_attribution: Layer 1 (macro catalyst: China export controls on critical minerals)
notes: Price closed June 6 at $105.99 (above entry zone). Today dropped -16% to $89.04, entering the recommended buy zone but sharply against the long thesis in the short term. No obvious news catalyst for the selloff found. Stop at $78 not triggered. Entry zone now accessible — could be a better entry for those not already in.

thesis_summary: LITE benefits from 800G/1.6T CPO photonics ramp for AI data centers — silicon photonics bottleneck as hyperscalers scale optical interconnects.
notes: June 6 close at $945.08 (above entry zone). Today dropped -8.6% to $863.66, now within the recommended entry zone. Stop at $795 not triggered. Price had spiked earlier in the week (5d high 1049.53) on note swap and AI news (Yahoo June 5). The pullback may reflect profit-taking. No specific negative catalyst found.

thesis_summary: HUBB benefits from electrical grid bottleneck (transformer lead times >2 years) driven by AI data center power demand — supply chain bottleneck node.
notes: June 6 close at $485.27 (above entry zone). Today mild -1.74% to $476.82, now within entry zone. Most resilient of the three. 5d trend still positive (+3.0%). No stop triggered. Thesis intact — this is the cleanest hold of the three.
